title: Magic numbers without named constants
diff:
diff --git a/validator.py b/validator.py
--- a/validator.py
+++ b/validator.py
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 def validate_age(age):
-    return MIN_AGE <= age <= MAX_AGE
+    if age < 0 or age > 150:
+        return False
+    if len(str(age)) > 3:
+        return False
+    return True

ground_truth.description: Magic numbers 0, 150, 3 used without named constants
